# Background

# User Stories
<!--
Format:
**As a** persona
**I want** feature/workflow
**So that** justification/reason

For Example:
**As a** blogger
**I want** an edited date associated with posts
**So that** I am able to display this in my templates
-->
**As a** 
**I want** 
**So that** 

# Acceptance Criteria
<!--
Format:
**Given** initial system setup
**When** an action occurs
**Then** expected behaviour

For Example:
**Given** a post markdown with an edited timestamp
**When** the post page is viewed
**Then** the default templates should show the edited timestamp
-->
**Given** 
**When** 
**Then**
